overview: The Department of Law at Daffodil International University includes students, teachers, students, administrators, staff, caretakers, and others who combine efforts to serve the society as a center for humanistic inquiry, for legal research, and for the provision of service which enhances the quality of life and access to justice and in particular.
waiver_info: Result-based waiver (Bachelor's), Waiver on SGPA (Semester result), Female quota, Need-based, Play quota, Physically challenged/specially-abled, tribal/ethnic group quota, Sibling/spouse and son/daughter of current students quota, Waiver for DIU alumni, Group admission quota, Freedom fighter quota, And many more.
eligibility: Eligibility for Admission: LL.B. (Hons.): Students having a minimum 2.5 GPA both in SSC and HSC or any equivalent background with a minimum 'C' grade in English from any group may apply for admission. And for English Medium, Students compile four O-level subjects and at least two.
curriculum_highlights: Constitutional Law of UK, USA & India
Law of Specific Relief, Limitation, General Clauses Act & Interpretation of Statutes
Banking, Money laundering & Antiha Rin Adalat Ain (LLB)
Land Laws of Bangladesh, Registration & Public Demands Recovery Act
intake: Spring: Jan-Apr | Summer: May-Aug | Fall: Sep-Dec
